sections.headline: DevSummit 2026 — The Future of AI
sections.subheadline: Join 5,000+ developers, researchers, and innovators for the most anticipated AI conference of the year. December 15, 2026 in San Francisco.

sections.title: Meet Our Speakers
sections.subtitle: World-class experts pushing the boundaries of artificial intelligence

cards.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez
cards.title: Chief AI Scientist, OpenMind Labs
cards.bio: Pioneer in multimodal AI systems. Led the team that built the first real-time neural translation engine. 20+ years in deep learning research.

cards.name: Marcus Chen
cards.title: VP of Engineering, NeuralScale
cards.bio: Architected distributed training infrastructure powering models with trillions of parameters. Former Google Brain infrastructure lead.

cards.name: Aisha Patel
cards.title: Founder, EthicalAI Initiative
cards.bio: Advocate for responsible AI deployment. Her framework for bias auditing is used by Fortune 500 companies worldwide.

cards.name: James O'Brien
cards.title: Research Director, DeepFuture
cards.bio: Specialist in reinforcement learning and autonomous agents. Published over 80 papers on emergent behavior in multi-agent systems.

cards.name: Sofia Nakamura
cards.title: Head of Product, CognitionX
cards.bio: Built AI-powered developer tools used by 2M+ engineers. Expert in human-AI collaboration and prompt engineering at scale.

cards.name: David Okonkwo
cards.title: Professor, MIT CSAIL
cards.bio: Leading researcher in neuromorphic computing. His lab's chip designs achieve 100x energy efficiency over traditional GPUs.

sections.title: Conference Schedule
sections.subtitle: A packed day of keynotes, workshops, and networking

slots.title: Opening Keynote: The Next Decade of AI
slots.speaker: Dr. Elena Vasquez
slots.description: A visionary look at where AI is heading and what it means for developers, businesses, and society.

slots.title: Scaling Intelligence: Infrastructure for Trillion-Parameter Models
slots.speaker: Marcus Chen
slots.description: Deep dive into the hardware and software stack required to train and serve the next generation of AI models.

slots.title: Workshop: Building Ethical AI Systems
slots.speaker: Aisha Patel
slots.description: Hands-on session covering bias detection, fairness metrics, and governance frameworks for production AI.

slots.title: Autonomous Agents: From Research to Reality
slots.speaker: James O'Brien
slots.description: Exploring the latest breakthroughs in agentic AI and how multi-agent systems are transforming industries.

slots.title: Closing Panel: AI & The Future of Human Creativity
slots.speaker: All Speakers
slots.description: An open debate on how AI augments human creativity, the role of developers in an AI-first world, and what comes next.

sections.title: Secure Your Spot
sections.subtitle: Early bird pricing ends November 1, 2026. Limited seats available.

sections.headline: Don't Miss the Future of AI
sections.subheadline: Join us on December 15, 2026 in San Francisco. Be part of the conversation that shapes tomorrow.
